vocabulary.description: Strong vocabulary diversity with high type-token ratio
vocabulary.impact: Demonstrates rich language use and avoids repetition

imagery.impact: Creates vivid mental pictures for the reader

figurative.description: Strong use of metaphors, similes, and other tropes
figurative.impact: Adds depth and layers of meaning

classical.description: Rich use of Sanskrit/Hindi Alankars (figures of speech)
classical.impact: Demonstrates mastery of classical poetic ornamentation

rasa.evidence: Consistent emotional tone detected via Navarasa theory

low_ttr.technical_explanation: Low type-token ratio indicates excessive word repetition
low_ttr.impact_analysis: Reduces vocabulary richness and reader engagement
low_ttr.suggested_fix: Vary word choice using synonyms and related terms

inconsistent_meter.impact_analysis: May lack musical rhythm expected in formal poetry
inconsistent_meter.suggested_fix: Either embrace free verse fully or establish consistent meter
inconsistent_meter.why_it_matters: Metrical consistency contributes to prosodic quality

technical_craft.description: Consider establishing a consistent metrical pattern or embracing free verse fully
technical_craft.example: Study exemplary poems in your chosen form for guidance

imagery.description: Add more vivid sensory details across multiple senses
imagery.example: Incorporate visual, auditory, and tactile imagery

originality.description: Explore more unique word choices and fresh metaphors
originality.example: Avoid clichés and seek unexpected comparisons

emotional_resonance.description: Deepen the dominant Rasa (emotional essence) using appropriate Bhavas
emotional_resonance.example: Use Vibhavas (stimuli) and Anubhavas (reactions) to evoke specific emotions

excellent.assessment: Professional-grade work ready for submission after light copyediting

good.assessment: Strong work requiring targeted edits before submission

poor.assessment: Early draft requiring major rework and development

performance.vocal_notes_high: Rich sound patterns detected suggest dynamic delivery.
performance.breath_notes_high: Average line length of {avg_len:.1f} words allows for natural breathing.
performance.breath_notes_low: Long complex lines require advanced breath control.
recommendations: Vary tempo during highly alliterative passages
Use the natural line breaks for strategic pauses
Emphasize sensory imagery to anchor audience attention

summary.template: This is a {total_lines}-line literary work with an overall quality score of {overall}/10. The work is of {quality}. Technical craft scores {technical}/10, while imagery and voice score {imagery}/10.

education.meter_template: **Metrical Consistency**: Your poem shows elements of {meter} meter, but with irregular execution (regularity: {regularity:.2f}). Study the pattern: {pattern} and practice scanning lines to improve consistency.
education.default: **Poetic Craft**: Continue developing your unique voice while studying established forms. Read widely in your chosen genre to internalize successful techniques.
